paperTitle: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers

highlights.text: We introduce a new language representation model called BERT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers.
BERT is designed to pre-train deep bidirectional representations from unlabeled text by jointly conditioning on both left and right context in all layers.
We show that pre-trained representations eliminate the need for many heavily-engineered task-specific architectures.
